title: Cruise operators' stocks are sliding after Carnival warns of rising fuel costs
text: Cruise operators' stocks are slumping after Carnival Corp. CCL, -7.83% on Friday warned of rising fuel prices that impacted the company's earnings. Carnival's stock plunged 8% in early-afternoon trading, while shares of Royal Caribbean Group RCL, -2.91% dipped 3%.

title: Dilution Factors Aside, Norwegian Offers Growth Momentum
text: The DCF analysis suggests a modest present overvaluation with a fair price of $16.31, but an exceptionally promising future price of $56.92, offering an impressive annual return of 46%. While NCLH's current cash reserves may not fully offset expected negative Free Cash Flow (FCF) in 2023, the calculated dilution scenario provides a viable solution. NCLH's historical industry resilience and experienced leadership make it a compelling investment opportunity, with the potential for strong annual returns from 35% to 46% through 2028.

title: Here's Why Investors Should Retain Norwegian Cruise (NCLH) Now
text: Norwegian Cruise (NCLH) emphasizes a simplified booking process to increase yields, guest satisfaction and guest repeat rates. However, a volatile macro environment is a headwind.

title: A Gray Wave Of Vacations Will Lift Cruise Lines 40% Or More, Analyst Says
text: Analysts upgraded Carnival, Norwegian Cruise Line on Thursday as a surge in retiree demand fuels rapid recovery for cruise lines.

title: 2 Cruise Stocks Steering Higher After Upgrade
text: Redburn Atlantic upgraded Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings Inc (NYSE:NCLH) and Carnival Corp (NYSE:CCL) to "buy" today.

title: Carnival and Norwegian Stocks Are Now a Buy, Analyst Says. The Pandemic Ache Is Over.
text: Redburn Atlantic analyst Alex Brignall upgrades shares of Carnival and Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings to Buy from Neutral.

title: Carnival Cruise Lines Stock: Buy, Sell, or Hold?
text: Revenue and bookings have surpassed the record highs of 2019. The legacy of Carnival's pandemic-driven debt burden negatively affects the company on many levels.

title: Why Norwegian Cruise Lines Plunged 25% in August
text: Norwegian's stock fell after Q3 earnings guidance failed to live up to optimistic expectations. Still, Q2 results were fairly solid.

title: 3 Stocks That Flaunt Remarkable Earnings Acceleration
text: Astute investors should keep an eye on stocks such as Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH), Barrick Gold (GOLD) and Atlassian (TEAM) for superb earnings acceleration.
